user.title: cTrader App Credentials
user.description:
Before starting:
1. Register your app at https://openapi.ctrader.com
2. Get Spotware approval
3. Set redirect URI to: http://localhost:8123/auth/external/callback

Then enter your app credentials below.

auth.title: Authorize cTrader Account
auth.description: Click the button below to open the cTrader authorization page. Log in with your cTID and allow access. You'll be redirected back automatically.

error.invalid_auth: Authorization failed. Check your Client ID and Secret.

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured
abort.missing_code: No authorization code received from cTrader.
abort.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange authorization code for tokens. Try again.
abort.invalid_auth: Tokens are invalid. Check your credentials and try again.
